instructions: Review classification.existing_matches and classification.novel_categories. Edit, add, or remove entries, then re-run with --resume (without --classify-only) to apply.

policy.clause: The system must not be used to produce misleading realistic images or videos, or to impersonate real people, in ways that enable deception that can harm democratic or criminal justice institutions.
policy.source_title: Code de conduite volontaire visant un développement et une gestion responsables des systèmes d'IA générative avancés

novel_categories.proposed_name: Deceptive synthetic media harming democratic institutions
novel_categories.summary: Use of realistic synthetic images or videos, or impersonation of real people, to deceive the public or officials in ways that undermine democratic institutions such as elections, legislatures, courts, or public trust in governance.
novel_categories.policy_fragment: deception that can harm democratic institutions

policy.clause: The system must not be used to produce misleading realistic images or videos, or to impersonate real people, in ways that enable deception that can harm democratic or criminal justice institutions.

source.title: Code de conduite volontaire visant un développement et une gestion responsables des systèmes d'IA générative avancés

novel_categories.reasoning: The clause targets realistic synthetic images/videos or impersonation used to deceive in ways that undermine democratic institutions; no existing leaf squarely captures this institutional-harm mechanism.

novel_categories.proposed_name: Criminal justice deception via synthetic media
novel_categories.summary: Use of misleading realistic images, videos, or impersonation of real people to deceive courts, juries, prosecutors, law enforcement, or other criminal justice actors in ways that could affect investigations, charging, testimony, or case outcomes.
novel_categories.policy_fragment: deception that can harm criminal justice institutions
